title: Roegneria retroflexa

intro: Roegneria retroflexa, also known as Chinese wild rye, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Poaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, offering relief from inflammation, fever, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant effects. The bioactive constituents of Roegneria retroflexa include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which contribute to its therapeutic properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, Roegneria retroflexa is commonly prepared as a decoction or an infusion, often combined with other herbs, to address various health concerns, and is also used in the form of a powder or a capsule for convenience.
